version_description: Complete chords and lyrics / versions with or without capo / suggestions for playable voicings / thoroughly ear-transcribed.
tuning: E A D G B E

pro_brother.version_description: Bass tab, slightly simplified. Synth bass on track - all notes staccato for the right feel.

content:
---------------------------------------------------------------------------
          Everything She Wants – Wham!
---------------------------------------------------------------------------

Written by: George Michael
From: “Make It Big” (1985)

Two versions , with and  without capo, because some chords just do not
transpose well here.

Version 1: capo 2nd fret (less baree - much easier to play)
Version 2: no capo (original chords)

---------------------------------------------------------------------------

VERSION 1: capo 2nd fret, play: E, key: F#

---------------------------------------------------------------------------

[tab]CHORDS
        E-A-D-G-B-e
Esus4   0-2-2-2-0-0  or E7sus4 0-7-7-7-5-0 / 0-2-0-2-0-0
E       0-2-0-1-0-0  or E7     0-7-6-7-5-0 / 0-2-0-1-0-0
A7sus4  x-0-2-0-3-0
Dadd9   x-5-4-2-3-0[/tab]

[tab]Bm(#5)  x-2-1-2-0-3 (chorus)
Bm7     x-2-0-2-0-2 (chorus)[/tab]

---------------------------------------------------------------------------


[Intro]
| [ch]Esus4[/ch] | [ch]E[/ch] | [ch]A7sus4[/ch] | [ch]Dadd9[/ch] |
| [ch]Esus4[/ch] | [ch]E[/ch] | [ch]A7sus4[/ch] | [ch]Dadd9[/ch] |
| [ch]Esus4[/ch] | [ch]E[/ch] | [ch]A7sus4[/ch] | [ch]Dadd9[/ch] |
| [ch]Esus4[/ch] | [ch]E[/ch] | [ch]A7sus4[/ch] | [ch]Dadd9[/ch] |
| [ch]Esus4[/ch] | [ch]E[/ch] | [ch]A7sus4[/ch] | [ch]Dadd9[/ch] |
| [ch]Esus4[/ch] | [ch]E[/ch] | [ch]A7sus4[/ch] | [ch]Dadd9[/ch] |

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]Esus4[/ch]     [ch]E[/ch]
 Somebody told me,[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]A7sus4[/ch]                  [ch]Dadd9[/ch]
Boy, everything she wants is everything she sees"[/tab]
[tab][ch]Esus4[/ch]                [ch]E[/ch]
 I guess I must have loved you.[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]A7sus4[/ch]                    [ch]Dadd9[/ch]
Cause I said you were the perfect girl for me, maybe[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]Esus4[/ch]                     [ch]E[/ch]
 But now we're six months older[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]A7sus4[/ch]                  [ch]Dadd9[/ch]
And everything you want and everything you see,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Esus4[/ch]                 [ch]E[/ch]
 Is out of reach, not good enough[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]A7sus4[/ch]                       [ch]Dadd9[/ch]
I don't know what the hell you want from me, boy[/tab]

[Bridge]
[tab]| [ch]Esus4[/ch] | [ch]E[/ch] | [ch]A7sus4[/ch] | [ch]Dadd9[/ch] |
Uh huh huh...Oh...oh...Uh huh huh...Doo doo doo...La la la la[/tab]
[tab]| [ch]Esus4[/ch] | [ch]E[/ch] | [ch]A7sus4[/ch] | [ch]Dadd9[/ch] |                           [ [ch]Am7[/ch] ]
Uh huh huh...Oh...oh...Uh huh huh...Doo doo doo...La la la la[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]| [ch]Am7[/ch] | [ch]B7(#5)[/ch] [ch]Bm7[/ch]   [ch]Em[/ch]       [ch]Em[/ch]    [ch]Em/D[/ch] [ch]Em/C[/ch] [ch]Em/B[/ch]
         Some- body  tell me (Won't you  tell me)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am7[/ch]      [ch]B7(#5)[/ch]  [ch]Bm7[/ch]      [ch]Em[/ch]
   Why I work so hard for you? (to give you money, all to give you money) ooh![/tab]

[Interlude]
| [ch]Esus4[/ch] | [ch]E[/ch] | [ch]A7sus4[/ch] | [ch]Dadd9[/ch] |
| [ch]Esus4[/ch] | [ch]E[/ch] | [ch]A7sus4[/ch] | [ch]Dadd9[/ch] |

[Break]
[tab][ch]Esus4[/ch]                  [ch]E[/ch]
 Some people work for a living,[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]A7sus4[/ch]                     [ch]Dadd9[/ch]
Some people work for fun, girl, I just work for you.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Esus4[/ch]                       [ch]E[/ch]
 They told me marriage was a give and take,[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]A7sus4[/ch]                               [ch]Dadd9[/ch]
Well, show me you can take you've got some giving to do.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Esus4[/ch]                           [ch]E[/ch]
 And now you tell me that you're having my baby,[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]A7sus4[/ch]                         [ch]Dadd9[/ch]
I'll tell you that I'm happy if you want me too[/tab]
[tab][ch]Esus4[/ch]                  [ch]E[/ch]
One step further and my back will break,[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]A7sus4[/ch]                       [ch]D[/ch]                          [ [ch]Esus4[/ch] ]
If my best isn't good enough, then how can it be good enough for two?[/tab]

[Bridge]
[tab]| [ch]Esus4[/ch] | [ch]E[/ch] | [ch]A7sus4[/ch] | [ch]Dadd9[/ch] |
Uh huh huh...Oh...oh...Uh huh huh...Doo doo doo...La la la la[/tab]
[tab]| [ch]Esus4[/ch] | [ch]E[/ch] | [ch]A7sus4[/ch] | [ch]Dadd9[/ch] |                              [ [ch]Am7[/ch] ]
Uh huh huh...Oh...oh...Uh huh huh...Doo doo doo...La la la la[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]| [ch]Am7[/ch] | [ch]B7(#5)[/ch] [ch]Bm7[/ch]   [ch]Em[/ch]       [ch]Em[/ch]    [ch]Em/D[/ch] [ch]Em/C[/ch] [ch]Em/B[/ch]
         Some- body  tell me (Won't you  tell me)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am7[/ch]      [ch]B7(#5)[/ch]  [ch]Bm7[/ch]      [ch]Em[/ch]
   Why I work so hard for you? (to give you money, all to give you money) ooh![/tab]

[Interlude]
| [ch]Esus4[/ch] | [ch]E[/ch] | [ch]A7sus4[/ch] | [ch]Dadd9[/ch] |
| [ch]Esus4[/ch] | [ch]E[/ch] | [ch]A7sus4[/ch] | [ch]Dadd9[/ch] |

[Interlude 2]
[tab][ch]Esus4[/ch]   [ch]Em[/ch]                          [ch]A7sus4[/ch]                 [ [ch]Esus4[/ch] ]
Oh!          Why do I do the things I do?     I'd tell you if I knew.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Esus4[/ch]   [ch]Em[/ch]    [ch]A7sus4[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]                      [ [ch]Am7[/ch] ]
             My God ...  I don't even think that I love you...[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]| [ch]Am7[/ch] | [ch]B7(#5)[/ch] [ch]Bm7[/ch] | [ch]Em[/ch] | [ch]Em[/ch]    [ch]Em/D[/ch] [ch]Em/C[/ch] [ch]Em/B[/ch] |
                         (Won't you  tell me)[/tab]
[tab]| [ch]Am7[/ch] | [ch]B7(#5)[/ch] [ch]Bm7[/ch] | [ch]Em[/ch] | % |
                       (To give you money, all to give you money)[/tab]

[Middle 8]
| [ch]Em[/ch] | % | [ch]Bm7[/ch] | [ch]B7[/ch] |
| [ch]Em[/ch] | % | [ch]Bm7[/ch] | [ch]B7[/ch] |

[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                          [ch]Bm[/ch]
 How could you settle for a boy like me[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Em[/ch]                      [ch]A[/ch]
When all I could see was the end of the week[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]C[/ch]                      [ch]C[/ch]
All the things we sign and the things we buy[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]F#m7[/ch]
Ain't gonna keep us together[/tab]
[tab][ch]B7[/ch]                         [ [ch]Em[/ch] ]
Girl, it's just a matter of time[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                   [ch]Bm7[/ch]
 My situation, never changes[/tab]
[tab][ch]B7[/ch]
Walking in that manner through that door[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                               [ch]Bm7[/ch]
  Yeah, like a stranger, but the wages[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]B7[/ch]                              [ch]Am7[/ch]    [ch]B7[/ch]
I give you all you say you want is more[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Em[/ch]                   [ch]A7[/ch]
And all I can see was the end of the week[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]C[/ch]                      [ch]C[/ch]
All the things we sign and the things we buy[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]F#m7[/ch]
Ain't gonna keep us together[/tab]
[tab][ch]B7[/ch]                         [ [ch]Esus4[/ch] ]
Girl, it's just a matter of time[/tab]

[Bridge]
[tab]| [ch]Esus4[/ch] | [ch]E[/ch] | [ch]A7sus4[/ch] | [ch]Dadd9[/ch] |
                         La la la la[/tab]
[tab]| [ch]Esus4[/ch] | [ch]E[/ch] | [ch]A7sus4[/ch] | [ch]Dadd9[/ch] |                              [ [ch]Am7[/ch] ]
Uh huh huh...Oh...oh...Uh huh huh...Doo doo doo...La la la la[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]| [ch]Am7[/ch] | [ch]B7(#5)[/ch] [ch]Bm7[/ch]   [ch]Em[/ch]       [ch]Em[/ch]    [ch]Em/D[/ch] [ch]Em/C[/ch] [ch]Em/B[/ch]
         Some- body  tell me (Won't you  tell me)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am7[/ch]      [ch]B7(#5)[/ch]  [ch]Bm7[/ch]      [ch]Em[/ch]
   Why I work so hard for you? (to give you money, all to give you money) ooh![/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]| [ch]Am7[/ch] | [ch]B7(#5)[/ch] [ch]Bm7[/ch]   [ch]Em[/ch]       [ch]Em[/ch]    [ch]Em/D[/ch] [ch]Em/C[/ch] [ch]Em/B[/ch]
         Some- body  tell me (Won't you  tell me)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am7[/ch]      [ch]B7(#5)[/ch]  [ch]Bm7[/ch]      [ch]Em[/ch]
   Why I work so hard for you? (to give you money, all to give you money) ooh![/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]| [ch]Am7[/ch] | [ch]B7(#5)[/ch] [ch]Bm7[/ch]   [ch]Em[/ch]       [ch]Em[/ch]    [ch]Em/D[/ch] [ch]Em/C[/ch] [ch]Em/B[/ch]
         Some- body  tell me (Won't you  tell me)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am7[/ch]      [ch]B7(#5)[/ch]     [ch]Bm7[/ch]     [ch]Em[/ch]
   Why I do the things that I do (to give you money, all to give you money) ooh![/tab]

(fade out over last chorus)



---------------------------------------------------------------------------

VERSION 2: no capo

---------------------------------------------------------------------------

[tab]CHORDS
        E-A-D-G-B-e
F#7sus4 2-4-2-4-2-2
F#7     2-4-2-3-2-2
B7sus4  x-2-4-2-5-2
Eadd9   0-2-2-1-0-2 or E9 0-2-0-1-0-2[/tab]

[tab]C#7(#5) x-4-3-4-0-5 (Chorus)
C#m7    x-4-2-4-0-4 (Chorus)[/tab]

---------------------------------------------------------------------------
